zh.lifeSummary: 當William Sinclair 8th Lord of Roslin於1328年出生在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安洛斯林時，他的父親William Sinclair 8th Laird of Rosslyn45歲，母親NN Rosabelle43歲。他於1345年之前與Isabella Strathearn在蘇格蘭奧可尼奧可尼 易曼德斯結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1314年登記服兵役。他去世於1358年9月17日之後在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安洛斯林，埋葬在蘇格蘭奧可尼奧可尼 易曼德斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Sinclair 8th Lord of Roslin于1328年出生在苏格兰米德洛迪安洛斯林时，他的父亲William Sinclair 8th Laird of Rosslyn45岁，母亲NN Rosabelle43岁。他于1345年之前与Isabella Strathearn在苏格兰奧可尼奧可尼 易曼德斯结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1314年登记服兵役。他去世于1358年9月17日之后在苏格兰米德洛迪安洛斯林，埋葬在苏格兰奧可尼奧可尼 易曼德斯。

nameMeanings.name: Sinclair
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Saint-Clair-sur-Elle (Manche), so called from the dedication of its church to Saint Clarus (see   Clare   3).
Americanized form of some similar (like-sounding) Jewish surname.

History: The Scottish family Sinclair (see 1 above) came to southern Scotland in the twelfth century from Huntingdonshire with the de Morvilles. Descendants of these Sinclairs became earls of Caithness in the 15th century. The frequency of the surname in Caithness and Orkney is largely due to the adoption by tenants of the name of their overlord.

variants.name: Clare
meanings: Irish (Clare, Wicklow, and Wexford): habitational name from Clare in Suffolk (an eastern county of England), the center of a major Norman baronial estate since the Norman Conquest. The English placename probably originated as a Celtic river name meaning ‘bright, gentle, or warm’. The surname is not from the Irish county name Clare, which is either from the surname or from a place called with Gaelic clár ‘plank bridge’. Another Norman surname in the southeast of Ireland was de Clere, from Clères in Seine-Maritime (France), named from the local river.

English and French: from the Middle English, Old French female personal name Cla(i)re (from Latin Clara, from clarus ‘clear, bright, famous’) which achieved some popularity, greater elsewhere in Europe than in England, through the fame of Saint Clare of Assisi (see Chiara ). The English surname seems to have been interchangeable with Clear 1.

English: occupational name from an agent derivative of Middle English cley ‘clay’. The work of medieval clayers involved plastering a framework of interwoven twigs with mud to produce wattle-and-daub work.

variants.name: St. Clair
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Sinclair  . This is also a French Canadian and American French altered form of the same surname.
French (Saint-Clair): habitational name from any of several places, e.g. in Normandy, named Saint-Clair (from the dedication of their churches to Saint Clarus). Compare Saintclair .

Haitian (also Saint-Clair): ornamental name or nickname, perhaps ironic, composed of French saint ‘saint’ or ‘holy’ and clair ‘clear’ or ‘lightness’. Alternatively, perhaps of the same French origin as 2 above. Compare Saintclair .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Sinclair 8th Lord of Roslin was born in 1328, in Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland, his father, William Sinclair 8th Laird of Rosslyn, was 45 and his mother, NN Rosabelle, was 43. He married Isabella Strathearn before 1345, in Orkney Islands, Orkney, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. He registered for military service in 1314. He died after 17 September 1358, in Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland, and was buried in Orkney Islands, Orkney, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Sinclair 8th Lord of Roslin est né en 1328, à Roslin, Midlothian, Écosse, son père, William Sinclair 8th Laird of Rosslyn, avait 45 ans et sa mère, NN Rosabelle, avait 43 ans. Il a épousé Isabella Strathearn avant 1345, à Orkney Islands, Orkney, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1314. Il est décédé après 17 septembre 1358, à Roslin, Midlothian, Écosse, et a été enterré à Orkney Islands, Orkney, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Sinclair 8th Lord of Roslin 1328 in Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Sinclair 8th Laird of Rosslyn 45 und seine Mutter NN Rosabelle 43. Er hat vor 1345 in Orkney Islands, Orkney, Scotland Isabella Strathearn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er hat sich 1314 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb nach 17. September 1358 in Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland und wurde in Orkney Islands, Orkney, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Sinclair 8th Lord of Roslin è nato il nel 1328 nel Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland, il suo padre, William Sinclair 8th Laird of Rosslyn, aveva 45 anni e il suo madre, NN Rosabelle, aveva 43 anni. Lui sposato Isabella Strathearn prima del 1345, nel Orkney Islands, Orkney, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1314. Morì dopo il 17 settembre 1358, nel Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland, e fu sepolto a Orkney Islands, Orkney, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: William Sinclair 8th Lord of Roslinが1328年にスコットランドミドロスアンロスリンで生まれた時，父William Sinclair 8th Laird of Rosslynは45歳，母NN Rosabelleは43歳であった。1345年以前にスコットランドオルクニーオルクニー イスランズでIsabella Strathearnと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1314年に兵役登録をした。彼は1358年9月17日以後にスコットランドミドロスアンロスリンで死去し，スコットランドオルクニーオルクニー イスランズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Sinclair 8th Lord of Roslin(이)가 1328년 스컷랜드 미들로스이언 로슬린에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Sinclair 8th Laird of Rosslyn(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 NN Rosabelle(은)는 43세였다. 그는 1345년 이전 스컷랜드 르니 르니 이슬랜드즈에서 Isabella Strathearn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1314년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1358년 9월 17일 이후 스컷랜드 미들로스이언 로슬린에서 사망했으며 스컷랜드 르니 르니 이슬랜드즈에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Sinclair 8th Lord of Roslin nasceu em 1328, em Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland, seu pai, William Sinclair 8th Laird of Rosslyn, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, NN Rosabelle, tinha 43 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabella Strathearn antes 1345, em Orkney Islands, Orkney, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1314. Ele faleceu após 17 de setembro de 1358, em Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland, e foi sepultado em Orkney Islands, Orkney, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Sinclair 8th Lord of Roslin родился в 1328 г. в местности рослинь, мидлотян, Шотландия, его отцу по имени William Sinclair 8th Laird of Rosslyn было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали NN Rosabelle, 43. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabella Strathearn перед 1345 г. в местности орни исландс, орни, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. В 1314 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер после 17 сентябрь 1358 г. в местности рослинь, мидлотян, Шотландия и был похоронен в местности орни исландс, орни, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Sinclair 8th Lord of Roslin nació en 1328, en Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland, su papá, William Sinclair 8th Laird of Rosslyn, tenía 45 años y su mamá, NN Rosabelle, tenía 43 años. Se casó con Isabella Strathearn antes de 1345, en Orkney Islands, Orkney, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1314. Murió después de 17 de septiembre de 1358, en Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland, y fue sepultado en Orkney Islands, Orkney, Scotland.
